decks.notes: This aggressive deck focuses on dealing fast and consistent damage to the opponent using a combination of low-cost creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to quickly build a board presence with hasty creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger, while also using burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to remove any potential blockers or threats. By maintaining pressure on the opponent and efficiently using direct damage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize and turn the tide in their favor.

The deck focuses on utilizing Greasefang Parhelion as the main combo piece to generate value and overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards that help search for key pieces, disrupt the opponent's strategy with hand disruption, and provide additional support for the combo. The deck aims to control the board and set up the combo to create a powerful and overwhelming board presence.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Thoughtseize and Cache Grab to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating value through cards like Bitter Triumph and Raffine's Informant. The deck also includes cards like Esika's Chariot and Skysovereign, Consul Flagship for additional threats and removal options. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's strategy and ensure consistency in executing the combo.

The Orzhov Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption with cards like Thoughtseize, removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse, and powerful threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. Bleachbone Verge and Godless Shrine help fix mana while Mutavault can turn into a creature to pressure opponents. Preacher of the Schism can gain life and generate value, while Anoint with Affliction can weaken opposing creatures. The deck ultimately aims to control the game and grind out a victory through attrition.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to generate a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Formidable Speaker, Cache Grab, and Thoughtseize to protect and support the combo pieces. The deck also includes control elements like Witherbloom Command and Overlord of the Balemurk to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors for the combo while also providing flexibility for other strategies.

This deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo to generate a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes various tools to set up the combo, such as Cache Grab and Witherbloom Command, while also providing disruption with cards like Thoughtseize. The key strategy involves utilizing Greasefang, Okiba Boss alongside Parhelion II to create an unbeatable board state. Additional cards like Formidable Speaker and Overlord of the Balemurk provide support and backup options for different situations, ultimately aiming to establish dominance and secure victory through powerful synergies.

This deck focuses on utilizing Lotus Field in combination with cards like Scapeshift to generate a large amount of mana quickly and efficiently. By using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Crumbling Vestige to ramp up mana production, the deck can activate powerful abilities such as Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and Stock Up to overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes cards like Port of Karfell and Boseiju, Who Endures to provide additional utility and protection. Overall, the deck aims to assemble an explosive combination of cards to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It aims to control the board and deal damage efficiently by utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Lightning Strike, and Monstrous Rage. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while utilizing the powerful creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Monastery Swiftspear. The inclusion of cards like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional reach and resilience. Overall, the deck aims to win the game by quickly reducing the opponent's life total to zero.

This UW control deck focuses on controlling the board with removal spells like Supreme Verdict and counters like Dovin's Veto, while generating card advantage with Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. The deck also utilizes card draw and manipulation tools such as Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive to maintain a strong hand and control the game. The inclusion of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion adds versatility and an alternate win condition. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents through careful resource management and strategic decision making.

This aggro deck focuses on swift and aggressive plays, using low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger to rush down opponents. Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike provide additional direct damage to control the board, while Reckless Rage and Monstrous Rage offer removal options. The deck also utilizes lands like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins for added versatility in combat. The aim is to overwhelm the opponent quickly before they can stabilize, ensuring a fast and decisive victory.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble the combo pieces of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful synergy that can overwhelm opponents quickly. The deck includes cards like Formidable Speaker and Esika's Chariot to support the combo and generate extra value. Cache Grab and Multiversal Passage help to search for the necessary pieces, while cards like Bitter Triumph and Thoughtseize provide disruption and control options. Additionally, cards like Raffine's Informant and Witherbloom Command offer versatility and flexibility in different game situations.

This aggro Red Deck Wins archetype is focused on dealing fast and consistent damage to the opponent. With cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Emberheart Challenger, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Spells like Lightning Strike, Burst Lightning, and Reckless Rage provide additional reach and removal to clear the way for attacks. The inclusion of Sokenzan, Crucible of Defiance and Den of the Bugbear offer late-game advantages if needed. Overall, this deck's strategy revolves around speedy aggression and efficient removal to secure the win.

This aggro red deck focuses on dealing quick and efficient damage to the opponent. Cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger help to chip away at the opponent's life total, while Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage provide direct damage and removal options. Den of the Bugbear and Sokenzan, Crucible of Defiance offer extra value and options for playing creatures. With a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize, ultimately winning the game through sheer force and speed.

This deck focuses on quick, aggressive plays to overwhelm the opponent and deal damage as quickly as possible. With a combination of efficient creatures like Soul-Scar Mage and Monastery Swiftspear, along with burn spells like Lightning Strike and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional reach in the late game, ensuring that the deck can close out games even if the opponent manages to stabilize.

The focus of this deck is to create a powerful combo using Greasefang and Parhelion II. This combo involves using cards like Fleeting Spirit and Iron-Shield Elf to protect your key combo pieces while disrupting your opponent's strategy with Thoughtseize and Fatal Push. The deck also utilizes various lands and spells to ensure consistency and board presence. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful and synergistic strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize Lotus Field in combination with various ramp spells and land enchantments to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for explosive plays and combo potential. By accelerating mana production and using cards like Spelunking to draw through the deck quickly, the goal is to set up for a game-ending Scapeshift or other powerful combo finish. The deck also incorporates cards like Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and Formidable Speaker to provide additional synergy and support for the main combo strategy.
